# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure SQL Database with basic configuration. Skip Advanced Threat Protection and auditing features to reduce costs for our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable security features after product-market fit when we have revenue.
# Category: cloud_database_security

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    name: string # provide a unique server name here
    apiVersion: '2017-10-01-preview'
    location: string # specify the region, for example: "eastus"
    properties:
      administratorLogin: string # provide SQL admin username
      administratorLoginPassword: string # provide SQL admin password 
      version: string # specify the database version, for example: "12.0"
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases
    name: string # provide a unique database name here
    apiVersion: '2017-10-01-preview'
    location: string # specify the region
    properties: {}
